ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the clothing type */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the clothing type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the clothing type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the clothing type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the size */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., sleeve length, chest size) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit ID of the measurement */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "size_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is a custom size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the size measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the size measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Design ID of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES product_designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the designer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the designer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the designer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the designer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the designer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the designer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the designer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the designer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the design belongs to */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who created the design */,
  "design_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "design_file" TEXT /* File path to the design file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the design was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_designs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_designs_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_history" (
  "measurement_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement history entry */,
  "size_measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size measurement the history belongs to */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was changed */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is a custom size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_history_size_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_measurement_id") REFERENCES size_measurements ("size_measurement_id")
)
